# TENET ‚Äî Agent Manifest

> Canonical hosted version: https://10et.ai/llms-full.txt
> This local copy provides a quick-reference for agents at session start.
> For the full manifest with all commands and capabilities, fetch the hosted version.

## What is TENET?

TENET is the complete operating system for AI agent teams. It provides:
- **Context Hub** ‚Äî semantic search, knowledge coordination across sessions
- **Memory System** ‚Äî graph edges, embeddings, temporal reasoning
- **RL Learning Loop** ‚Äî eval ‚Üí reward ‚Üí policy head ‚Üí autonomous improvement
- **Subway Mesh** ‚Äî P2P agent-to-agent coordination
- **Session Management** ‚Äî all sessions on main, journal-based isolation, auto-commit
- **Journal Protocol** ‚Äî structured JSONL entries for features, decisions, fixes, discoveries
- **Build Agents** ‚Äî isolated /tmp worktrees, push+PR, trust-gated merge via character eval

## Core Commands

| Command | What it does |
|---------|-------------|
| `tenet context` | Get project context (journal entries + knowledge docs) |
| `tenet hud` | Project dashboard ‚Äî metrics, trends, status |
| `tenet memory search <query>` | Search past decisions, features, learnings |
| `tenet memory add` | Persist insights/decisions to project memory |
| `tenet journal write` | Write structured journal entry |
| `tenet eval status` | Eval scores and trends |
| `tenet build` | Guided agent creation (The Sequence) |
| `tenet build --list` | Show all agents and scores |
| `tenet build --dispatch <issue#>` | Full pipeline: issue ‚Üí spec ‚Üí eval ‚Üí TOML ‚Üí run |
| `tenet flow run overnight` | Run agents autonomously overnight |
| `tenet skill load <name>` | Load a skill (build-agent, spec, fly-deploy, etc.) |
| `tenet pivot` | Checkpoint work mid-session |
| `tenet synopsis` | Summarize recent work |
| `tenet update` | Update GTM toolkit (CLAUDE.md, skills/) |

## Agent Tools (MCP / Pi)

| Capability | Claude Code MCP | Pi tool |
|------------|-----------------|---------|
| Get project context | `mcp__tenet-context__context_get` | `tenet_context` |
| Search past work | `mcp__tenet-context__memory_search` | `tenet_memory_search` |
| Add memory | `mcp__tenet-context__memory_add` | `tenet_memory_add` |
| Project dashboard | `/hud` skill | `tenet_hud` |
| Publish event | `mcp__tenet-context__events_publish` | `tenet_publish_event` |
| Write journal | `mcp__tenet-context__journal_write` | `tenet_journal_write` |
| Match skill by intent | `mcp__tenet-context__skill_match` | ‚Äî |
| Load skill (fuzzy) | `mcp__tenet-context__skill_load` | `tenet_skill_load` |
| Dispatch build agent | `mcp__tenet-context__build_dispatch` | ‚Äî |

## Skills

| Skill | Use when |
|-------|----------|
| `build-agent` | Building agents, evals, specs, overnight runs |
| `spec` | Writing/reviewing specs or PRDs (adversarial review) |
| `brand-architect` | Brand, logo, colors, design system |
| `fly-deploy` | Deploying to Fly.io |
| `content-creator` | Content, posts, threads |
| `ci-setup` | CI/CD setup |
| `pi-agents` | Multi-agent coordination |
| `voice-ingest` | Voice memo or audio file processing |

## Key Concepts

- **Sessions** ‚Äî Three-tier: (1) JSONL-first on main (single session), (2) worktree isolation (concurrent), (3) PR escape valve (conflicts). Auto-commit every 120s.
- **Journal entries** ‚Äî JSONL at `.tenet/journal/session-*.jsonl`, merged to `main.jsonl` on cleanup. Types: feature, decision, fix, discovery, milestone
- **Memory** ‚Äî persistent cross-session knowledge in `.tenet/memory.db` (SQLite WAL, auto-heals corruption)
- **Context Hub** ‚Äî HTTP daemon on deterministic port. Self-recovers from OOM crashes. Configurable via `TENET_HUB_HEAP_MB`.
- **Presence** ‚Äî File-based heartbeat at `.tenet/presence/*.json` (30s interval). Stale files cleaned on session start.
- **Cloud sync** ‚Äî `tenet sync` pushes journals/memory/evals to TENET Cloud. GitHub App webhook syncs knowledge files to Postgres.
- **Self-healing** ‚Äî hub auto-restarts on crash (30s cooldown), `tenet doctor --fix` repairs journals/memory/duplicates

## Architecture

```
project/           <- Your workspace
  knowledge/       <- strategy, vision, brand docs
  specs/           <- product and feature specs
  .tenet/          <- journal, memory, config, sessions, agents
  llms.txt         <- this file (agent manifest)
  CLAUDE.md        <- agent instructions
  AGENTS.md        <- canonical runtime protocol
```

## Links

- Full manifest: https://10et.ai/llms-full.txt
